contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 180
- Description: Onboarded two new processing partners on agroverse_shop_beta. (1) Shiok Singapore Kitchen, Menlo Park (Dennis Lim) — first processing partner, off-hours commercial kitchen access for cacao nibs to chocolate bar conversion. Drafted partner page from scratch (story, gallery, Partner Information block, Leaflet map at 625 Oak Grove Ave), added hub card, added partners-data + partner_locations entries, recorded the dennis_lim_shiok_kitchen_screenshot_agreement on the Agroverse Cacao Processing Cost sheet at USD 10/kg quote. (2) Santos Chocolate Factory, Itabuna, Bahia (Jose Carlos) — second processing partner, first at origin. Transcribed and translated 4 Portuguese video interviews offline using faster-whisper, drafted partner page (3-paragraph story, 3-image gallery, map at -14.820673/-39.297334), added Brazil hub card, added santos-chocolate-factory to lint EXEMPT_SLUGS as international partner. Defense-in-depth lint shipped that fails CI if any partner page lacks hub/partners-data/partner_locations entries (PR 93). dao_client onboard_retail_partner.py refactored to onboard_partner.py with --role flag (PR 44). Pacific West Coast journey updated to keep Ponderosa and Shiok as stops; only Prism Percussions remains excluded. Public-facing copy fix: Gary Teh framed as longtime supporter rather than founder on Shiok page. Merged PRs: agroverse_shop_beta 88, 89, 92, 93, 94, 95; dao_client 44.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
